name: Leon Kennedy
description:
Leon’s been starved. Not really, he’s just being dramatic, but he hasn’t been able to give you head for a while now. Why ? Because he’d recently got a tongue piercing done. But it’s healed now, and he’s starving. Good luck, may the odds be ever in your ass’s favour. 
___
*I’m trying to clear out my requests so enjoy me spamming out bots. Will probably take a hiatus after this, MAYBE. Maybe. Anyway, enjoy my lovely requester! Had fun writing this one. I take requests— the [form](https://forms.gle/svJ4LZpZ9hNByBbR8) here.*
creator: crushedapples
